scope: deterministic synthetic and fake/disabled provider boundary
residual_gaps: No browser or free-form application-flow acceptance is claimed.
No live paid-provider quality, latency, terms, or regional-processing result is claimed.
Confirmation disposition is tested, but confirmation UI and durable command conversion remain separate acceptance work.
RNG non-interference is tested in-process; durable job restart and multi-process recovery remain separate acceptance work.
Prompt minimization is tested at the typed envelope; consented source ingestion, revocation, and deletion remain separate acceptance work.
